summary: Implemented Phase 0 only. Added a faction architecture inventory doc, filled the lifecycle matrix with current sources/tests instead of TBDs, added a faction-assumption checker that ratchets existing current-faction special-case files, added focused Rust tests for current catalog and standard start-loadout parity, strengthened command-card descriptor coverage, and marked plans/faction/phase-0.md done.
gameplay_impact: No gameplay change. This phase only documents and tests current single-faction assumptions so later faction work can prove it preserves existing behavior.
next_executor_notes: Phase 1 can start from docs/design/faction-architecture-inventory.md and plans/faction/lifecycle-matrix.md. The new checker intentionally allows existing current-faction special-case files; new production files with direct current-faction EntityKind/AbilityKind checks should use the future catalog API or update the checker with an explicit reason.
manual_test_notes: No gameplay manual testing required. Human review should focus on whether the inventory and lifecycle matrix identify the right current assumptions and follow-up ownership for later phases.
